category_sources: source_facts.description calls it a mail user agent; official manual https://mutt.org/doc/manual/ describes Mutt as a text-based MIME mail client.
display_name_sources: Official homepage https://www.mutt.org/ and official manual https://mutt.org/doc/manual/ use the name Mutt.
docs_sources: Official homepage has a Documentation section linking the manual; official manual is dedicated documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official manual and download page point contributors and pre-release code to the Mutt GitLab project https://gitlab.com/muttmua/mutt.
tags_sources: source_facts.description names a mail user agent; official manual describes a text-based MIME mail client.
